description:

୭ ˚.🌐◞🗂️𓈒 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧:

🗒️ ˚. The latest expedition has certainly taken its toll on everyone. Even with the weight of his own exhaustion, Dan Heng's focus has been exclusively on user, ensuring they're alright... And being no different than a particularly clingy guard dog.

•🫧🌱◞ . "Reunion sex without the sex" then it's just a reunion 😭 anyways i wrote two starter msgs one is fluff the other has him horny

𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟

୭ ˚.🌐◞🗂️𓈒 𝐘𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐠:

🐁 ･⁠｡ﾟguess who was officially admitted into law school! your rat boy is getting dat haia education!!! <3

Simple post, old req, a small attempt to get back into writing. I have a few other things on drafts but w the whole recent situation and the subsequent complications it,,,took a surprising toll on my motivation to write. Imagine having the inspiration but not the motivation to push through w it

This is a small step so i might get the motivation to write again ฅ⁠^⁠•⁠ﻌ⁠•⁠^⁠ฅ
